sglang.title: bench: Add a benchmark for vLM: MMMU
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Modifications
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Code Formatting with Pre-Commit.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Running Unit Tests.
 Update documentation / docstrings / example tutorials as needed, according to Writing Documentation.
 Provide throughput / latency benchmark

sglang.title: Extract generation_manager from tokenizer_manager
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
A large portion of TokenizerManager (or indeed Orchestrator, as is renamed in #3116) is related to generation, and the generation logic is somehow isolated from the other parts. Thus this is extracted.
Moreover, by doing this refactor, adding SPMD logic would be a bit easier and cleaner.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] V1 Memory Profiling: V0 Sampler Integration without Rejection Sampler
vllm.author: JenZhao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates the sampling logic from the V0 version of profile_run into the V1 memory profiling tool. Note that the rejection sampler is not included.
Testing on  H100 GPU with CUDA 12.4 with VLLM_USE_V1=1 python3 examples/offline_inference/basic/basic.py
before the change
INFO 02-21 06:27:03

vllm.title: Correction to TP logic for Mamba Mixer 2 when Num Groups not divisible by TP Size
vllm.author: fabianlim
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current logic is incorrect for the case when n_groups cannot can  be divided by TP size, this requires more change to the kernels. This is because it currently uses this simple ratio logic to map the head to the correct group. However, one can imagine in the more general case it is more complica

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Support `vllm:cache_config_info`
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #10582
prometheus_client has support for Info metrics which are equivalent to a Gauge whose value is permanently set to 1, but exposes interesting key/value pair information via labels. This is used for information about an instance that does not change - so it only needs to be observed at s

vllm.title: [Metrics] Add `--show-hidden-metrics-for-version` CLI arg
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Part of #10582 and discussed in #12745
Add some infrastructure to help us deprecate and remove metrics in a less user-hostile way.
Our deprecation process will now be:

Deprecate the metric in 0.N.0 - document the deprecation in
release notes, user-facing docs, and the help text in /metrics
Hide the

vllm.title: [Misc] Reduce LoRA-related static variable
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Remove LoRA-related static variable supported_lora_modules, which not only makes our model implementation cleaner but also enables smoother LoRA support
Work

 Delete all models supported_lora_modules
  Add unit test

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Fix pre-commit errors
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix pre-commit errors that occur on main due to pre-commit not being run correctly prior to the patch #13695

vllm.title: [core] set up data parallel communication
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
We need to explore data parallel in many cases, e.g. in deepseek models, and moe models.
While the end-user interface is still to be designed, this PR first creates the necessary communication channel for data parallel, and leave the interface for future design.

In the future, as long as an externa

vllm.title: [ci] fix linter
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #13591 is merged before the pre-commit fix.

vllm.title: Support SSL Key Rotation in HTTP Server
vllm.author: youngkent
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some production setup requires TLS key/cert rotation in HTTP server. This change use watchfiles to async'ly monitor the updates of ssl key, cert, and CA files, and update the SSLContext when changes are detected.
Test cmd
vllm serve /tmp/model -tp 1 --max_num_seqs 32  --ssl-keyfile ~/test_certs/serv

vllm.title: [NVIDIA] Support nvfp4 cutlass gemm
vllm.author: kaixih
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Forked from #12519 (Will be closed soon), we decide to separate the fp4 quantization and fp4 gemm as two PRs. (1) fp4 quantization (PR merged); (2) fp4 gemm (This PR).
This PR requires Cutlass 3.8 (which hasn't been officially released yet) to fully function. However, it should still build using pla

vllm.title: [V1][Kernel] Refactor the prefix_prefill kernel so that the caller no longer has to pass in the context lengths
vllm.author: SageMoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This patch changes the prefix_prefill kernel so that it will calculate the context length using the query length and the sequence length, both of which are already passed in. This makes the kernel a bit more usable on V1 where we don't keep track of the context lengths tensor in the attention meta d

vllm.title: [ROCm] Apply FP8 weights padding to values not divisible by 512 bytes on ROCm
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Performance improvement for ROCm working around the hardware limitation.

In GEMM, you can have significant Tagram channel hotspot problems on MI300 if the stride of a matrix is a multiple of 512 bytes in GEMM. This is especially true for TN transpose cases, which might increase the latency of VMEM

vllm.title: [Doc] Dockerfile instructions for optional dependencies and dev transformers
vllm.author: DarkLight1337

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix boolean conversion for OpenVINO env variable
vllm.author: helena-intel
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two minor fixes for OpenVINO integration:

improve boolean conversion for VLLM_OPENVINO_ENABLE_QUANTIZED_WEIGHTS. Only set it to True if user sets it to ON, True or 1.
Only convert models that are exported to OpenVINO on the fly to INT8, keep pre-converted IR models as is, regardless of VLLM_OPENVIN

vllm.title: [CI/Build] fix uv caching in Dockerfile
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
uv uses its own cache in /root/.cache/uv and does not use /root/.cache/pip
fixup to #13566

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Fix pre-commit errors from #13571
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #13571 was merged without the the updated pre-commit and therefore broke the check on main. This PR fixes it.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Minor: logger import in attention backend
vllm.author: andylolu2
vllm.bodyExcerpt: vllm/attention/backends/utils.py is not using the logger from vllm.logger.init_logger

vllm.title: [ci] Use env var to control whether to use S3 bucket in CI
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Revert all the changes that change model name to S3 and add load_format
^ move all of that to 1 place in arg_utils where if the model is in S3 allowlist and env var is on, model name is changed to S3 and load format is changed to Run AI
Fix a bunch of tests
Some lint fixes
